operational_scenes.scene_title: Sorter Shoot Data and Parcel Handling Overview
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain sorter shoot data issues and parcel handling when shoots close
operational_intents: Describe lack of sensors and data types used
Discuss shoot overfilling and data loss scenarios
Explain parcel handling when not sorted to shoot
Detail shoot closing and reopening process based on thresholds
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by data issues and parcel flow
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct topics on data and parcel handling

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Tote Exchange Process and Coordination
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe AGV tote exchange staging and movement coordination
operational_intents: Explain staging conditions for tote exchange
Detail AGV positioning and tote lifting
Describe simultaneous AGV movements during exchange
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Coherent operational sequence on tote exchange

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Role Transition and Chute Operation
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain AGV role changes and chute opening/closing logic
operational_intents: Describe AGV role after dropping tote
Explain timing of chute opening relative to AGV movement
Discuss software commands for AGV movement coordination
Detail chute closing conditions
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by AGV role and chute control

operational_scenes.scene_title: Exchange Timing and Shoot Closure Management
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss timing goals for exchanges and shoot closure impacts
operational_intents: Explain exchange timing thresholds and goals
Describe consequences of shoot closure on exchange time
Discuss end of cycle and shift options for shoot management

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe AGV arrival at tipper and tipping operation
operational_intents: Explain AGV arrival and tipper availability
Detail tipping initiation and operator interaction
Describe software monitoring and bag label printing

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Post-Tip Actions and Exception Handling
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain AGV actions after tipping and handling failures
operational_intents: Describe AGV return to sorter or hospital after tip
Discuss failure scenarios and hospital routing
Explain battery charging and system continuity
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by post-tip and exception handling
